# FetchService gRPC API

<!-- Code generated by typegen. DO NOT EDIT. -->
<!-- Regenerate with: make types -->

FetchService provides HTTP fetching for plugins. QNTX performs the HTTP request and attests the result — plugins stay pure orchestration with no outbound network access.

**Proto file**: [`plugin/grpc/protocol/fetch.proto`](https://github.com/teranos/QNTX/blob/main/plugin/grpc/protocol/fetch.proto)

## Service Methods

| Method | Request | Response | Streaming |
|--------|---------|----------|-----------|
| Fetch | FetchRequest | FetchResponse | No |

### Fetch

Fetch performs an HTTP GET and attests the response body

- **Request**: `FetchRequest`
- **Response**: `FetchResponse`

---

## Message Types

### FetchRequest

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| auth_token | string | - |
| url | string | - |
| subjects | string | - |
| predicate | string | - |
| context | string | - |
| fresh | bool | - |

### FetchResponse

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| success | bool | - |
| error | string | - |
| body | string | - |
| status_code | int32 | - |
| attestation_id | string | - |
